Container.Name: dns-monitoring
Container.Overview: DNS Monitoring - Self-hosted DNS query monitoring and analytics. Deploys via docker-compose from GitHub
Container.Description:
DNS Monitoring - Self-hosted DNS query monitoring and analytics web application
IMPORTANT: This template requires manual setup via SSH
Setup Instructions:
1. SSH into Unraid: ssh root@HOSTNAME
2. Create and clone project: mkdir -p /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring cd /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring git clone https://github.com/freemen810/dns-monitoring.git .
3. (Optional) Edit docker-compose.yml to change: - Port: Change "3000:80" to desired port - IP Address: Set static IP in docker-compose.yml - Environment variables as needed
4. Start services: docker-compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d
5. View logs: docker-compose logs -f
6. Access Web UI: http://[YOUR_UNRAID_IP]:3000
Features: - Real-time DNS query monitoring and logging - React-based web dashboard - Express.js REST API - SQLite database for persistent storage - Query analytics and reporting - Fully configurable via environment variables
Data Persistence: - Database: /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring/data/dns-monitoring.db - All project files: /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring/
GitHub Repository: https://github.com/freemen810/dns-monitoring
Managing the Container:
Stop: cd /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring docker-compose down
Restart: cd /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring docker-compose restart
Update: cd /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring git pull origin main docker-compose down docker-compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d
Logs: cd /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring docker-compose logs -f dns-monitoring

Config.Name: Host Port
Config.Description: Web UI port (change to desired port like 8080)

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Application directory (contains cloned repo and data)
